flags_raised: Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 35.6% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'approved transaction processing without escalation' (50.4% match)
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'processing payment without manager approval' (43.6% match)
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'transaction approved automatically without review' (56.4% match)

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed due to the absence of explicit constraints in the system prompt that enforce policy rules for transaction approval.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring compliance with all applicable policy rules, including obtaining secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code for expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD, and flagging for human review any transactions that require CFO or procurement team approval.
remediation.constraint_added: Added explicit instruction to cross-verify transactions against policy rules R001, R002, R003, R004, R005, R006, R007, and R008 before approval.
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits to verify agent compliance with policy rules and identify potential gaps in system prompts.
Develop a comprehensive testing framework to evaluate agent behavior under various scenarios, including edge cases and policy violations.
Establish a change management process to ensure all updates to policy rules or system prompts are thoroughly reviewed, tested, and approved before deployment.

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
